revision.comment: スタブ
revision.text:
'''癸未'''（みずのとひつじ、きび）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて20番目で、前は[[壬午]]、次は[[甲申]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は水、[[十二支]]の五行は土で、[[五行思想#相剋|相剋]]（土剋水）である。
==癸未の年==
==癸未の日== ===[[選日]]=== 癸未の日は[[犯土|小土]]の6日目である。

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is [[壬午|Renwu]], and the following sign is [[甲申|Jia Shen]]. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Twelve Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
== Years of 癸未 == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[23]] * [[83]] * [[143]] * [[203]] * [[263]] * [[323]] * [[383]] * [[443]] * [[503]] * [[563]] * [[623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[1043]] * [[1103]] * [[1163]] * [[1223]] * [[1283]] * [[1343]] * [[1403]] * [[1463]] * [[1523]] * [[1583]] * [[1643]] * [[1703]] * [[1763]] * [[1823]] * [[1883]] * [[1943]] | * [[2003]] * [[2063]] * [[2123]] * [[2183]] * [[2243]] * [[2303]] * [[2363]] * [[2423]] * [[2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[2903]] * [[2963]] |}
== Months of 癸未 == The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems [[庚|Geng]] and [[乙|Yi]]) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Lunar calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
== Days of 癸未 == Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of [[Xiaodu|minor earth]].
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.
== Related Articles == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]][[ja:癸未]]

{{干支}} '''癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Renwu|ja|壬午}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|甲申}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Twelve Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
== Years of 癸未 == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[23]] * [[83]] * [[143]] * [[203]] * [[263]] * [[323]] * [[383]] * [[443]] * [[503]] * [[563]] * [[623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[1043]] * [[1103]] * [[1163]] * [[1223]] * [[1283]] * [[1343]] * [[1403]] * [[1463]] * [[1523]] * [[1583]] * [[1643]] * [[1703]] * [[1763]] * [[1823]] * [[1883]] * [[1943]] | * [[2003]] * [[2063]] * [[2123]] * [[2183]] * [[2243]] * [[2303]] * [[2363]] * [[2423]] * [[2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[2903]] * [[2963]] |}
== Months of 癸未 == The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Lunar calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
== Days of 癸未 == Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|壬午}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|甲申}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Twelve Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
== Years of 癸未 == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|壬午}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|甲申}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Twelve Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
== Years of 癸未 == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[23]] * [[83]] * [[143]] * [[203]] * [[263]] * [[323]] * [[383]] * [[443]] * [[503]] * [[563]] * [[623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[1043]] * [[1103]] * [[1163]] * [[1223]] * [[1283]] * [[1343]] * [[1403]] * [[1463]] * [[1523]] * [[1583]] * [[1643]] * [[1703]] * [[1763]] * [[1823]] * [[1883]] * [[1943]] | * [[2003]] * [[2063]] * [[2123]] * [[2183]] * [[2243]] * [[2303]] * [[2363]] * [[2423]] * [[2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[2903]] * [[2963]] |}
== Months of 癸未 == The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Lunar calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
== Days of 癸未 == Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|壬午}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|甲申}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Twelve Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
== Years of 癸未 == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[23]] * [[83]] * [[143]] * [[203]] * [[263]] * [[323]] * [[383]] * [[443]] * [[503]] * [[563]] * [[623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[1043]] * [[1103]] * [[1163]] * [[1223]] * [[1283]] * [[1343]] * [[1403]] * [[1463]] * [[1523]] * [[1583]] * [[1643]] * [[1703]] * [[1763]] * [[1823]] * [[1883]] * [[1943]] | * [[2003]] * [[2063]] * [[2123]] * [[2183]] * [[2243]] * [[2303]] * [[2363]] * [[2423]] * [[2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[2903]] * [[2963]] |}
== Months of 癸未 == The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Lunar calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
== Days of 癸未 == Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|壬午}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|甲申}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Twelve Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
== Years of 癸未 == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[23]] * [[83]] * [[143]] * [[203]] * [[263]] * [[323]] * [[383]] * [[443]] * [[503]] * [[563]] * [[623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[1043]] * [[1103]] * [[1163]] * [[1223]] * [[1283]] * [[1343]] * [[1403]] * [[1463]] * [[1523]] * [[1583]] * [[1643]] * [[1703]] * [[1763]] * [[1823]] * [[1883]] * [[1943]] | * [[2003]] * [[2063]] * [[2123]] * [[2183]] * [[2243]] * [[2303]] * [[2363]] * [[2423]] * [[2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[2903]] * [[2963]] |}
== Months of 癸未 == The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Lunar calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
== Days of 癸未 == Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|壬午}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|甲申}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Twelve Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
== Years of 癸未 == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[23]] * [[83]] * [[143]] * [[203]] * [[263]] * [[323]] * [[383]] * [[443]] * [[503]] * [[563]] * [[623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[1043]] * [[1103]] * [[1163]] * [[1223]] * [[1283]] * [[1343]] * [[1403]] * [[1463]] * [[1523]] * [[1583]] * [[1643]] * [[1703]] * [[1763]] * [[1823]] * [[1883]] * [[1943]] | * [[2003]] * [[2063]] * [[2123]] * [[2183]] * [[2243]] * [[2303]] * [[2363]] * [[2423]] * [[2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[2903]] * [[2963]] |}
== Months of 癸未 == The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Lunar calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
== Days of 癸未 == Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

== Months of 癸未 == The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Lunar calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
== Days of 癸未 == Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|壬午}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|甲申}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Twelve Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
== Years of 癸未 == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! == Months of 癸未 == The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Lunar calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
== Days of 癸未 == Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[ja:G" to "[[sn:"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|壬午}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|甲申}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Twelve Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
== Years of 癸未 == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[23]] * [[83]] * [[143]] * [[203]] * [[263]] * [[323]] * [[383]] * [[443]] * [[503]] * [[563]] * [[623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[1043]] * [[1103]] * [[1163]] * [[1223]] * [[1283]] * [[1343]] * [[1403]] * [[1463]] * [[1523]] * [[1583]] * [[1643]] * [[1703]] * [[1763]] * [[1823]] * [[1883]] * [[1943]] | * [[2003]] * [[2063]] * [[2123]] * [[2183]] * [[2243]] * [[2303]] * [[2363]] * [[2423]] * [[2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[2903]] * [[2963]] |}
== Months of 癸未 == The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Lunar calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
== Days of 癸未 == Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|壬午}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|甲申}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Twelve Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
== Years of 癸未 == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[23]] * [[83]] * [[143]] * [[203]] * [[263]] * [[323]] * [[383]] * [[443]] * [[503]] * [[563]] * [[623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[1043]] * [[1103]] * [[1163]] * [[1223]] * [[1283]] * [[1343]] * [[1403]] * [[1463]] * [[1523]] * [[1583]] * [[1643]] * [[1703]] * [[1763]] * [[1823]] * [[1883]] * [[1943]] | * [[2003]] * [[2063]] * [[2123]] * [[2183]] * [[2243]] * [[2303]] * [[2363]] * [[2423]] * [[2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[2903]] * [[2963]] |}
== Months of 癸未 == The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Lunar calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
== Days of 癸未 == Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|壬午}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|甲申}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Twelve Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
== Years of 癸未 == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[23]] * [[83]] * [[143]] * [[203]] * [[263]] * [[323]] * [[383]] * [[443]] * [[503]] * [[563]] * [[623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[1043]] * [[1103]] * [[1163]] * [[1223]] * [[1283]] * [[1343]] * [[1403]] * [[1463]] * [[1523]] * [[1583]] * [[1643]] * [[1703]] * [[1763]] * [[1823]] * [[1883]] * [[1943]] | * [[2003]] * [[2063]] * [[2123]] * [[2183]] * [[2243]] * [[2303]] * [[2363]] * [[2423]] * [[2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[2903]] * [[2963]] |}
== Months of 癸未 == The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Lunar calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
== Days of 癸未 == Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|壬午}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|甲申}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Twelve Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
== Years of 癸未 == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[23]] * [[83]] * [[143]] * [[203]] * [[263]] * [[323]] * [[383]] * [[443]] * [[503]] * [[563]] * [[623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[1043]] * [[1103]] * [[1163]] * [[1223]] * [[1283]] * [[1343]] * [[1403]] * [[1463]] * [[1523]] * [[1583]] * [[1643]] * [[1703]] * [[1763]] * [[1823]] * [[1883]] * [[1943]] | * [[2003]] * [[2063]] * [[2123]] * [[2183]] * [[2243]] * [[2303]] * [[2363]] * [[2423]] * [[2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[2903]] * [[2963]] |}
== Months of 癸未 == The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Lunar calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
== Days of 癸未 == Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|庚}}" to "|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)}}"
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|壬午}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|甲申}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Twelve Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
== Years of 癸未 == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[23]] * [[83]] * [[143]] * [[203]] * [[263]] * [[323]] * [[383]] * [[443]] * [[503]] * [[563]] * [[623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[1043]] * [[1103]] * [[1163]] * [[1223]] * [[1283]] * [[1343]] * [[1403]] * [[1463]] * [[1523]] * [[1583]] * [[1643]] * [[1703]] * [[1763]] * [[1823]] * [[1883]] * [[1943]] | * [[2003]] * [[2063]] * [[2123]] * [[2183]] * [[2243]] * [[2303]] * [[2363]] * [[2423]] * [[2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[2903]] * [[2963]] |}
== Months of 癸未 == The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Lunar calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
== Days of 癸未 == Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|壬午}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|甲申}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Twelve Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
== Years of 癸未 == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[23]] * [[83]] * [[143]] * [[203]] * [[263]] * [[323]] * [[383]] * [[443]] * [[503]] * [[563]] * [[623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[1043]] * [[1103]] * [[1163]] * [[1223]] * [[1283]] * [[1343]] * [[1403]] * [[1463]] * [[1523]] * [[1583]] * [[1643]] * [[1703]] * [[1763]] * [[1823]] * [[1883]] * [[1943]] | * [[2003]] * [[2063]] * [[2123]] * [[2183]] * [[2243]] * [[2303]] * [[2363]] * [[2423]] * [[2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[2903]] * [[2963]] |}
== Months of 癸未 == The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Lunar calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
== Days of 癸未 == Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

Goat]][[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Water Goat}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:Water Sheep]][[Category:Https://fr.wikipedia.org/wiki/]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:Water {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|壬午}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|甲申}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Twelve Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
== Years of 癸未 == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[23]] * [[83]] * [[143]] * [[203]] * [[263]] * [[323]] * [[383]] * [[443]] * [[503]] * [[563]] * [[623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[1043]] * [[1103]] * [[1163]] * [[1223]] * [[1283]] * [[1343]] * [[1403]] * [[1463]] * [[1523]] * [[1583]] * [[1643]] * [[1703]] * [[1763]] * [[1823]] * [[1883]] * [[1943]] | * [[2003]] * [[2063]] * [[2123]] * [[2183]] * [[2243]] * [[2303]] * [[2363]] * [[2423]] * [[2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[2903]] * [[2963]] |}
== Months of 癸未 == The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Lunar calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
== Days of 癸未 == Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|壬午}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|甲申}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Twelve Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
== Years of 癸未 == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[23]] * [[83]] * [[143]] * [[203]] * [[263]] * [[323]] * [[383]] * [[443]] * [[503]] * [[563]] * [[623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[1043]] * [[1103]] * [[1163]] * [[1223]] * [[1283]] * [[1343]] * [[1403]] * [[1463]] * [[1523]] * [[1583]] * [[1643]] * [[1703]] * [[1763]] * [[1823]] * [[1883]] * [[1943]] | * [[2003]] * [[2063]] * [[2123]] * [[2183]] * [[2243]] * [[2303]] * [[2363]] * [[2423]] * [[2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[2903]] * [[2963]] |}
== Months of 癸未 == The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Lunar calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
== Days of 癸未 == Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|壬午}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|甲申}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Twelve Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
== Years of 癸未 == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[23]] * [[83]] * [[143]] * [[203]] * [[263]] * [[323]] * [[383]] * [[443]] * [[503]] * [[563]] * [[623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[1043]] * [[1103]] * [[1163]] * [[1223]] * [[1283]] * [[1343]] * [[1403]] * [[1463]] * [[1523]] * [[1583]] * [[1643]] * [[1703]] * [[1763]] * [[1823]] * [[1883]] * [[1943]] | * [[2003]] * [[2063]] * [[2123]] * [[2183]] * [[2243]] * [[2303]] * [[2363]] * [[2423]] * [[2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[2903]] * [[2963]] |}
== Months of 癸未 == The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Lunar calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
== Days of 癸未 == Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.
== Related Articles == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:completion tier 5]][[Category: tier 5]][[Category: 5]] [[Category:deprecated 11 open]]<!--Yin Water Goat-->[[Category:11]][[sn:Yin Water Goat]][[Category:11]]{{DEFAULTSORT:Yin Water Goat}}[[Category:11]] [[Category:Water Sheep]][[Category:Https://fr.wikipedia.org/wiki/]] [[Category:Water {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|壬午}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|甲申}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Twelve Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
== Years of 癸未 == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[23]] * [[83]] * [[143]] * [[203]] * [[263]] * [[323]] * [[383]] * [[443]] * [[503]] * [[563]] * [[623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[1043]] * [[1103]] * [[1163]] * [[1223]] * [[1283]] * [[1343]] * [[1403]] * [[1463]] * [[1523]] * [[1583]] * [[1643]] * [[1703]] * [[1763]] * [[1823]] * [[1883]] * [[1943]] | * [[2003]] * [[2063]] * [[2123]] * [[2183]] * [[2243]] * [[2303]] * [[2363]] * [[2423]] * [[2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[2903]] * [[2963]] |}
== Months of 癸未 == The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Lunar calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
== Days of 癸未 == Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|壬午}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|甲申}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Twelve Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
== Years of 癸未 == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[23]] * [[83]] * [[143]] * [[203]] * [[263]] * [[323]] * [[383]] * [[443]] * [[503]] * [[563]] * [[623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[1043]] * [[1103]] * [[1163]] * [[1223]] * [[1283]] * [[1343]] * [[1403]] * [[1463]] * [[1523]] * [[1583]] * [[1643]] * [[1703]] * [[1763]] * [[1823]] * [[1883]] * [[1943]] | * [[2003]] * [[2063]] * [[2123]] * [[2183]] * [[2243]] * [[2303]] * [[2363]] * [[2423]] * [[2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[2903]] * [[2963]] |}
== Months of 癸未 == The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Lunar calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
== Days of 癸未 == Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.
== Related Articles == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}}
<!--Yin Water Goat-->
<!--Yin Water Goat-->

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|壬午|12=draft|12=draft}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|甲申|12=draft|12=draft}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Twelve Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
== Years of 癸未 == Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[23]] * [[83]] * [[143]] * [[203]] * [[263]] * [[323]] * [[383]] * [[443]] * [[503]] * [[563]] * [[623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[1043]] * [[1103]] * [[1163]] * [[1223]] * [[1283]] * [[1343]] * [[1403]] * [[1463]] * [[1523]] * [[1583]] * [[1643]] * [[1703]] * [[1763]] * [[1823]] * [[1883]] * [[1943]] | * [[2003]] * [[2063]] * [[2123]] * [[2183]] * [[2243]] * [[2303]] * [[2363]] * [[2423]] * [[2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[2903]] * [[2963]] |}
== Months of 癸未 == The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=draft|12=draft}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=draft|12=draft}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Lunar calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
== Days of 癸未 == Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|12=draft|12=draft}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.
== Related Articles == * {{prefix}} * {{intitle}} <!--Yin Water Goat-->
<!--Yin Water Goat-->

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|qq=}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとひつじ (mizunoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きかのひつじ (kika-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きび (kibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Water Goat== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[23]] * [[83]] * [[143]] * [[203]] * [[263]] * [[323]] * [[383]] * [[443]] * [[503]] * [[563]] * [[623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[1043]] * [[1103]] * [[1163]] * [[1223]] * [[1283]] * [[1343]] * [[1403]] * [[1463]] * [[1523]] * [[1583]] * [[1643]] * [[1703]] * [[1763]] * [[1823]] * [[1883]] * [[1943]] | * [[2003]] * [[2063]] * [[2123]] * [[2183]] * [[2243]] * [[2303]] * [[2363]] * [[2423]] * [[2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[2903]] * [[2963]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Goat== The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Water Goat== Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaodu|qq=}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.
== Related Articles == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:Kui-chhiū]] [[zh-yue:癸未]]

}}

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|qq=}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとひつじ (mizunoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きかのひつじ (kika-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きび (kibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|qq=}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi

The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|qq=}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとひつじ (mizunoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きかのひつじ (kika-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きび (kibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Water Goat== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[23]] * [[83]] * [[:en:143|143]] * [[203]] * [[263]] * [[323]] * [[383]] * [[443]] * [[503]] * [[563]] * [[623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[:en:1043|1043]] * [[:en:1103|1103]] * [[:en:1163|1163]] * [[:en:1223|1223]] * [[:en:1283|1283]] * [[:en:1343|1343]] * [[:en:1403|1403]] * [[:en:1463|1463]] * [[:en:1523|1523]] * [[:en:1583|1583]] * [[:en:1643|1643]] * [[1703]] * [[1763]] * [[1823]] * [[1883]] * [[1943]] | * [[2003]] * [[2063]] * [[2123]] * [[2183]] * [[2243]] * [[2303]] * [[2363]] * [[2423]] * [[2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[2903]] * [[2963]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Goat== The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Water Goat== Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaodu|qq=}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとひつじ (mizunoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きかのひつじ (kika-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きび (kibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Water Goat== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[23]] * [[83]] * [[:en:143|143]] * [[203]] * [[263]] * [[323]] * [[383]] * [[443]] * [[503]] * [[563]] * [[623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[:en:1043|1043]] * [[:en:1103|1103]] * [[:en:1163|1163]] * [[:en:1223|1223]] * [[:en:1283|1283]] * [[:en:1343|1343]] * [[:en:1403|1403]] * [[:en:1463|1463]] * [[:en:1523|1523]] * [[:en:1583|1583]] * [[:en:1643|1643]] * [[:en:1703|1703]] * [[:en:1763|1763]] * [[:en:1823|1823]] * [[1883]] * [[1943]] | * [[2003]] * [[2063]] * [[2123]] * [[2183]] * [[2243]] * [[2303]] * [[2363]] * [[2423]] * [[2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[2903]] * [[2963]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Goat== The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Water Goat== Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaodu|qq=}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi

The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとひつじ (mizunoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きかのひつじ (kika-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きび (kibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Water Goat== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[23]] * [[83]] * [[:en:143|143]] * [[:en:203|203]] * [[263]] * [[323]] * [[383]] * [[443]] * [[503]] * [[563]] * [[623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[:en:1043|1043]] * [[:en:1103|1103]] * [[:en:1163|1163]] * [[:en:1223|1223]] * [[:en:1283|1283]] * [[:en:1343|1343]] * [[:en:1403|1403]] * [[:en:1463|1463]] * [[:en:1523|1523]] * [[:en:1583|1583]] * [[:en:1643|1643]] * [[:en:1703|1703]] * [[:en:1763|1763]] * [[:en:1823|1823]] * [[:en:1883|1883]] * [[:en:1943|1943]] | * [[:en:2003|2003]] * [[:en:2063|2063]] * [[:en:2123|2123]] * [[2183]] * [[2243]] * [[2303]] * [[2363]] * [[2423]] * [[2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[2903]] * [[2963]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Goat== The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Water Goat== Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaodu|qq=}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとひつじ (mizunoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きかのひつじ (kika-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きび (kibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Water Goat== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:23|23]] * [[83]] * [[:en:143|143]] * [[:en:203|203]] * [[263]] * [[323]] * [[383]] * [[443]] * [[503]] * [[563]] * [[623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[:en:1043|1043]] * [[:en:1103|1103]] * [[:en:1163|1163]] * [[:en:1223|1223]] * [[:en:1283|1283]] * [[:en:1343|1343]] * [[:en:1403|1403]] * [[:en:1463|1463]] * [[:en:1523|1523]] * [[:en:1583|1583]] * [[:en:1643|1643]] * [[:en:1703|1703]] * [[:en:1763|1763]] * [[:en:1823|1823]] * [[:en:1883|1883]] * [[:en:1943|1943]] | * [[:en:2003|2003]] * [[:en:2063|2063]] * [[:en:2123|2123]] * [[:en:2183|2183]] * [[:en:2243|2243]] * [[:en:2303|2303]] * [[2363]] * [[2423]] * [[2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[2903]] * [[2963]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Goat== The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Water Goat== Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaodu|qq=}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとひつじ (mizunoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きかのひつじ (kika-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きび (kibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Water Goat== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:23|23]] * [[83]] * [[:en:143|143]] * [[:en:203|203]] * [[:en:263|263]] * [[323]] * [[383]] * [[443]] * [[503]] * [[563]] * [[623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[:en:1043|1043]] * [[:en:1103|1103]] * [[:en:1163|1163]] * [[:en:1223|1223]] * [[:en:1283|1283]] * [[:en:1343|1343]] * [[:en:1403|1403]] * [[:en:1463|1463]] * [[:en:1523|1523]] * [[:en:1583|1583]] * [[:en:1643|1643]] * [[:en:1703|1703]] * [[:en:1763|1763]] * [[:en:1823|1823]] * [[:en:1883|1883]] * [[:en:1943|1943]] | * [[:en:2003|2003]] * [[:en:2063|2063]] * [[:en:2123|2123]] * [[:en:2183|2183]] * [[:en:2243|2243]] * [[:en:2303|2303]] * [[:en:2363|2363]] * [[:en:2423|2423]] * [[:en:2483|2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[:en:2903|2903]] * [[:en:2963|2963]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Goat== The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Water Goat== Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaodu|qq=}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.
== Related Articles == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

}}

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとひつじ (mizunoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きかのひつじ (kika-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きび (kibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi

This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).

revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとひつじ (mizunoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きかのひつじ (kika-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きび (kibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Water Goat== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:23|23]] * [[83]] * [[:en:143|143]] * [[:en:203|203]] * [[:en:263|263]] * [[:en:323|323]] * [[:en:383|383]] * [[:en:443|443]] * [[:en:503|503]] * [[:en:563|563]] * [[:en:623|623]] * [[683]] * [[743]] * [[803]] * [[863]] * [[923]] * [[983]] | * [[:en:1043|1043]] * [[:en:1103|1103]] * [[:en:1163|1163]] * [[:en:1223|1223]] * [[:en:1283|1283]] * [[:en:1343|1343]] * [[:en:1403|1403]] * [[:en:1463|1463]] * [[:en:1523|1523]] * [[:en:1583|1583]] * [[:en:1643|1643]] * [[:en:1703|1703]] * [[:en:1763|1763]] * [[:en:1823|1823]] * [[:en:1883|1883]] * [[:en:1943|1943]] | * [[:en:2003|2003]] * [[:en:2063|2063]] * [[:en:2123|2123]] * [[:en:2183|2183]] * [[:en:2243|2243]] * [[:en:2303|2303]] * [[:en:2363|2363]] * [[:en:2423|2423]] * [[:en:2483|2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[:en:2903|2903]] * [[:en:2963|2963]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Goat== The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Water Goat== Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaodu|qq=}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
