revision.text:
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとひつじ (mizunoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きかのひつじ (kika-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きび (kibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Water Goat== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:23|23]] * [[:en:83|83]] * [[:en:143|143]] * [[:en:203|203]] * [[:en:263|263]] * [[:en:323|323]] * [[:en:383|383]] * [[:en:443|443]] * [[:en:503|503]] * [[:en:563|563]] * [[:en:623|623]] * [[:en:683|683]] * [[:en:743|743]] * [[:en:803|803]] * [[:en:863|863]] * [[:en:923|923]] * [[:en:983|983]] | * [[:en:1043|1043]] * [[:en:1103|1103]] * [[:en:1163|1163]] * [[:en:1223|1223]] * [[:en:1283|1283]] * [[:en:1343|1343]] * [[:en:1403|1403]] * [[:en:1463|1463]] * [[:en:1523|1523]] * [[:en:1583|1583]] * [[:en:1643|1643]] * [[:en:1703|1703]] * [[:en:1763|1763]] * [[:en:1823|1823]] * [[:en:1883|1883]] * [[:en:1943|1943]] | * [[:en:2003|2003]] * [[:en:2063|2063]] * [[:en:2123|2123]] * [[:en:2183|2183]] * [[:en:2243|2243]] * [[:en:2303|2303]] * [[:en:2363|2363]] * [[:en:2423|2423]] * [[:en:2483|2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[:en:2903|2903]] * [[:en:2963|2963]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Goat== The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Water Goat== Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaodu|qq=}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

==Months of Yin Water Goat== The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}) is a 癸未 month. {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi

This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[:en:Lesser Heat|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Autumn|Beginning of Autumn]]).

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062599]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Goat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとひつじ (mizunoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きかのひつじ (kika-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きび (kibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Water Goat== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! ==Months of Yin Water Goat== The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[:en:Lesser Heat|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Autumn|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Water Goat== Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaodu|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-ê]][[de:Wasser-Schaf]][[fr:Chèvre d'eau]][[hak:Kui-vi]][[ja:癸未]][[ko:계미]][[nds:Water-Schaap]][[vi:Quý Mùi]][[za:Gveiqmeih]][[zh_min_nan:Kùi-bī]][[zh_yue:癸未]][[zh:癸未]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062599]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Goat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとひつじ (mizunoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きかのひつじ (kika-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きび (kibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Water Goat== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[:en:Lesser Heat|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Autumn|Beginning of Autumn]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-ê]][[de:Wasser-Schaf]][[fr:Chèvre d'eau]][[hak:Kui-vi]][[ja:癸未]][[ko:계미]][[nds:Water-Schaap]][[vi:Quý Mùi]][[za:Gveiqmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-bī]][[zh-yue:癸未]][[zh:癸未]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062599]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Goat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi

--> ==Years of Yin Water Goat== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]].

This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[:en:Lesser Heat|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Autumn|Beginning of Autumn]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-ê]][[de:Wasser-Schaf]][[fr:Chèvre d'eau]][[hak:Kui-vi]][[ja:癸未]][[ko:계미]][[nds:Water-Schaap]][[vi:Quý Mùi]][[za:Gveiqmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-bī]][[zh-yue:癸未]][[zh:癸未]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062599]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Goat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi

--> ==Years of Yin Water Goat== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]].

==Days of Yin Water Goat== Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaodu|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-ê]][[de:Wasser-Schaf]][[fr:Chèvre d'eau]][[hak:Kui-vi]][[ja:癸未]][[ko:계미]][[nds:Water-Schaap]][[vi:Quý Mùi]][[za:Gveiqmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-bī]][[zh-yue:癸未]][[zh:癸未]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062599]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Goat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi

==Months of Yin Water Goat== The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[:en:Lesser Heat|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Autumn|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Water Goat== Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaodu|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-ê]][[de:Wasser-Schaf]][[fr:Chèvre d'eau]][[hak:Kui-vi]][[ja:癸未]][[ko:계미]][[nds:Water-Schaap]][[vi:Quý Mùi]][[za:Gveiqmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-bī]][[zh-yue:癸未]][[zh:癸未]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062599]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Goat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとひつじ (mizunoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きかのひつじ (kika-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きび (kibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Water Goat== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]].

This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[:en:Lesser Heat|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Autumn|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Water Goat== Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaodu|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-ê]][[de:Wasser-Schaf]][[fr:Chèvre d'eau]][[hak:Kui-vi]][[ja:癸未]][[ko:계미]][[nds:Water-Schaap]][[vi:Quý Mùi]][[za:Gveiqmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-bī]][[zh-yue:癸未]][[zh:癸未]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062599]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Goat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとひつじ (mizunoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きかのひつじ (kika-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きび (kibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Water Goat== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! ==Months of Yin Water Goat== The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[:en:Lesser Heat|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Autumn|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Water Goat== Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaodu|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-ê]][[de:Wasser-Schaf]][[fr:Chèvre d'eau]][[hak:Kui-vi]][[ja:癸未]][[ko:계미]][[nds:Water-Schaap]][[vi:Quý Mùi]][[za:Gveiqmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-bī]][[zh-yue:癸未]][[zh:癸未]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062599]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Goat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi

--> ==Years of Yin Water Goat== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[:en:Lesser Heat|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Autumn|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Water Goat== Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaodu|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-ê]][[de:Wasser-Schaf]][[fr:Chèvre d'eau]][[hak:Kui-vi]][[ja:癸未]][[ko:계미]][[nds:Water-Schaap]][[vi:Quý Mùi]][[za:Gveiqmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-bī]][[zh-yue:癸未]][[zh:癸未]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062599]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Goat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi

--> ==Years of Yin Water Goat== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[:en:Lesser Heat|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Autumn|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Water Goat== Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaodu|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

==Months of Yin Water Goat== The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[:en:Lesser Heat|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Autumn|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Water Goat== Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaodu|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-ê]][[de:Wasser-Schaf]][[fr:Chèvre d'eau]][[hak:Kui-vi]][[ja:癸未]][[ko:계미]][[nds:Water-Schaap]][[vi:Quý Mùi]][[za:Gveiqmeih]][[zh_min_nan:Kùi-bī]][[zh_yue:癸未]][[zh:癸未]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-ê]][[de:Wasser-Schaf]][[fr:Chèvre d'eau]][[hak:Kui-vi]][[ja:癸未]][[ko:계미]][[nds:Water-Schaap]][[vi:Quý Mùi]][[za:Gveiqmeih]][[zh_min_nan:Kùi-bī]][[zh_yue:癸未]][[zh:癸未]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-ê]][[de:Wasser-Schaf]][[fr:Chèvre d'eau]][[hak:Kui-vi]][[ja:癸未]][[ko:계미]][[nds:Water-Schaap]][[vi:Quý Mùi]][[za:Gveiqmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-bī]][[zh-yue:癸未]][[zh:癸未]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062599]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Goat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi

It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとひつじ (mizunoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きかのひつじ (kika-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きび (kibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Water Goat== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:23|23]] * [[:en:83|83]] * [[:en:143|143]] * [[:en:203|203]] * [[:en:263|263]] * [[:en:323|323]] * [[:en:383|383]] * [[:en:443|443]] * [[:en:503|503]] * [[:en:563|563]] * [[:en:623|623]] * [[:en:683|683]] * [[:en:743|743]] * [[:en:803|803]] * [[:en:863|863]] * [[:en:923|923]] * [[:en:983|983]] | * [[:en:1043|1043]] * [[:en:1103|1103]] * [[:en:1163|1163]] * [[:en:1223|1223]] * [[:en:1283|1283]] * [[:en:1343|1343]] * [[:en:1403|1403]] * [[:en:1463|1463]] * [[:en:1523|1523]] * [[:en:1583|1583]] * [[:en:1643|1643]] * [[:en:1703|1703]] * [[:en:1763|1763]] * [[:en:1823|1823]] * [[:en:1883|1883]] * [[:en:1943|1943]] | * [[:en:2003|2003]] * [[:en:2063|2063]] * [[:en:2123|2123]] * [[:en:2183|2183]] * [[:en:2243|2243]] * [[:en:2303|2303]] * [[:en:2363|2363]] * [[:en:2423|2423]] * [[:en:2483|2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[:en:2903|2903]] * [[:en:2963|2963]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Goat== The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[:en:Lesser Heat|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Autumn|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Water Goat== Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaodu|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

revision.comment: Text replacement - "zh_min_nan" to "zh-min-nan"
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-ê]][[de:Wasser-Schaf]][[fr:Chèvre d'eau]][[hak:Kui-vi]][[ja:癸未]][[ko:계미]][[nds:Water-Schaap]][[vi:Quý Mùi]][[za:Gveiqmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-bī]][[zh_yue:癸未]][[zh:癸未]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-ê]][[de:Wasser-Schaf]][[fr:Chèvre d'eau]][[hak:Kui-vi]][[ja:癸未]][[ko:계미]][[nds:Water-Schaap]][[vi:Quý Mùi]][[za:Gveiqmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-bī]][[zh_yue:癸未]][[zh:癸未]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterbok (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-ê]][[de:Wasser-Schaf]][[fr:Chèvre d'eau]][[hak:Kui-vi]][[ja:癸未]][[ko:계미]][[nds:Water-Schaap]][[vi:Quý Mùi]][[za:Gveiqmeih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-bī]][[zh-yue:癸未]][[zh:癸未]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q1062599]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Goat [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:31, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Water Goat also known as 癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].
It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branch]] 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji ***Onyomi 1: kingi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
<!-- == * Yin Water Goat (癸未) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとひつじ (mizunoto-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きかのひつじ (kika-no-hitsuji) ***Onyomi: きび (kibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemi ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi
--> ==Years of Yin Water Goat== Years in which the remainder when divided by 60 is 23 correspond to 癸未 in the [[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]].
{| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of 癸未''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd millennium]] |- | * [[:en:23|23]] * [[:en:83|83]] * [[:en:143|143]] * [[:en:203|203]] * [[:en:263|263]] * [[:en:323|323]] * [[:en:383|383]] * [[:en:443|443]] * [[:en:503|503]] * [[:en:563|563]] * [[:en:623|623]] * [[:en:683|683]] * [[:en:743|743]] * [[:en:803|803]] * [[:en:863|863]] * [[:en:923|923]] * [[:en:983|983]] | * [[:en:1043|1043]] * [[:en:1103|1103]] * [[:en:1163|1163]] * [[:en:1223|1223]] * [[:en:1283|1283]] * [[:en:1343|1343]] * [[:en:1403|1403]] * [[:en:1463|1463]] * [[:en:1523|1523]] * [[:en:1583|1583]] * [[:en:1643|1643]] * [[:en:1703|1703]] * [[:en:1763|1763]] * [[:en:1823|1823]] * [[:en:1883|1883]] * [[:en:1943|1943]] | * [[:en:2003|2003]] * [[:en:2063|2063]] * [[:en:2123|2123]] * [[:en:2183|2183]] * [[:en:2243|2243]] * [[:en:2303|2303]] * [[:en:2363|2363]] * [[:en:2423|2423]] * [[:en:2483|2483]] * [[2543]] * [[2603]] * [[2663]] * [[2723]] * [[2783]] * [[2843]] * [[:en:2903|2903]] * [[:en:2963|2963]] |}
==Months of Yin Water Goat== The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[:en:Lesser Heat|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Autumn|Beginning of Autumn]]).
==Days of Yin Water Goat== Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaodu|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

==Days of Yin Water Goat== Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaodu|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.
=== Special days === Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Goat also known as  癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].

It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch}} 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Goat (癸未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: kingi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi

<!--

***Onyomi: きかのひつじ (kika-no-hitsuji)
***Onyomi: きび (kibi)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemi
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi

-->

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Goat also known as  癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].

It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch}} 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Goat (癸未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: kingi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi

<!--
==
* Yin Water Goat (癸未) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: みずのとひつじ (mizunoto-hitsuji)
***Onyomi: きかのひつじ (kika-no-hitsuji)
***Onyomi: きび (kibi)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemi
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi

-->

==Months of Yin Water Goat==
The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[:en:Lesser Heat|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Autumn|Beginning of Autumn]]).

==Days of Yin Water Goat==
Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaodu|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

=== Special days ===
Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

==Months of Yin Water Goat==
The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[:en:Lesser Heat|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Autumn|Beginning of Autumn]]).

==Days of Yin Water Goat==
Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaodu|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

=== Special days ===
Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Goat also known as  癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].

It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch|1=Earthly Branches}} 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Goat (癸未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: kingi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi

==Months of Yin Water Goat==
The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[:en:Lesser Heat|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Autumn|Beginning of Autumn]]).

==Days of Yin Water Goat==
Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaodu|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

=== Special days ===
Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Goat|kanji=癸未|romaji=mizunoto hitsuji|onyomi=kimbi|p=guǐwèi|w=kuei-wei|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ weɪ̯|y=gwai2 mei6|j=gwai2 mei6|ci=kʷɐi mei|mc=kjwɨj mei|oc-bs=kʷeʔ mei|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Goat also known as  癸未''' (Mizunoto-hitsuji, Kisui-no-hitsuji, Kibi) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Chinese sexagenary cycle signs]].

It is the 20th in the cycle of combinations. The preceding sign is {{ill|Yang Water Horse|ja|1=Yang Water Horse|2=ja|壬午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the following sign is {{ill|Jia Shen|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jia Shen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. According to the [[Yin-yang and the Five Elements theory|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory]], the [[Ten Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stem]] 癸 represents Yin Water, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch|1=Earthly Branches}} 未 represents Yin Earth, forming a relationship of [[Five Elements#Controlling cycle|mutual restraint]] (Earth restrains Water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Goat (癸未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: kingi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-mi (계미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi

<!--
==

** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 mei6
**  Japanese:

***Onyomi: きかのひつじ (kika-no-hitsuji)
***Onyomi: きび (kibi)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyemi
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Mùi

-->

==Months of Yin Water Goat==
The sixth month in years where the last digit of the Western year is 0 or 5 (corresponding to the Heavenly Stems {{ill|Geng|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Geng|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} and {{ill|Yi|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}) is a 癸未 month. This month may also refer to [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|lunar months]] or [[solar term months]] (from [[:en:Lesser Heat|Lesser Heat]] to the day before [[:en:Beginning of Autumn|Beginning of Autumn]]).

==Days of Yin Water Goat==
Days with the 癸未 combination are designated as the sixth day of {{ill|Xiaodu|ja|犯土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xiaodu|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

=== Special days ===
Days of 癸未 carry special selection rules under the calendar system.
